summary: v6 Boss Fight Lock System fully verified. 14/14 pytest cases passed covering: weak beginner locked at D-rank with all lift+quest items missing, POST /boss-fight 403 with detail.error='boss_fight_locked', moderate profile meeting lift mins but failing total+quests, strong profile (sq160/bn100/dl200) still locked due to quests<6, S-rank max_rank=true unlocked, 404 for invalid profile, and the full unlock path (log 6 workouts → requirements.locked=false → POST /boss-fight returns 200). Regression on /rank-progress, /achievements, /dashboard, /progress, /cardio, /workout/log, /ai-coach all 200 OK.

minor.issue: evaluate_boss_requirements computes deload_count via short-circuit: `sum(...) or (1 if first_deload_done else 0)`. If a user has actual W6 deloads (sum>0) the fallback is skipped (correct); if sum==0 it falls back to int(first_deload_done). This works for current spec (D requires 0 deloads) but the `deloads_done = int(first_deload_done) + max(0, boss_fight_count)` line on L1212 computes an UNUSED value — dead code. Cleanup suggestion only.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now 1400+ lines — overdue for split into routes/models/helpers modules (>700-line guideline still unmet from v5).

evaluate_boss_requirements: line 1212 `deloads_done = int(first_deload_done) + max(0, boss_fight_count)` is computed but never used. The actual count comes from line 1216. Safe to delete L1212 for clarity.

403 response shape: FastAPI HTTPException(detail=dict) returns `{detail: {error, message, next_rank, missing, requirements}}` at the response top level. Frontend must read response.detail.error not response.error — current shape matches spec.
seed_data_creation: Created ~8 TEST_v6_-prefixed profiles during pytest run (weak, weak_post, moderate, strong_noquests, s_rank, unlock, regression). Not cleaned up — isolated by TEST_v6_ prefix.
context_for_next_testing_agent: v6 Boss Fight Lock System validated. Requirements endpoint returns {locked, next_rank, next_threshold_kg, rank_threshold_kg, requirements:[{key,label,have,need,unit,met}], missing:[strings], max_rank}. POST /boss-fight returns 403 with detail={error:'boss_fight_locked', message, next_rank, missing, requirements} when locked. Unlock confirmed by logging 6 workouts (each with all exercises done=true) — quests counter on requirements jumps to 6 and locked flips false. All v1-v5 regression endpoints still 200 OK.
